title: nephrodium scabrum
intro: Nephrodium scabrum, also known as Scabrous Nephrodium, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Nephrodium scabrum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Nephrodium scabrum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat conditions such as fever, colds, and bronchitis.
